title: Metrics Data Rain Animation
topic: Build a browser animation that turns incoming metrics into falling, colliding bars.
prompt: Build a browser animation that turns incoming metric events into falling bars that collide or stack. Include visible metric labels, a live or simulated feed, pause controls, and a reduced-motion mode. The animation should show measurable frame changes over time and should not rely on inaccessible color alone.
successCriteria: Incoming metrics are represented as falling or colliding bars.
Frames differ over time while running.
Reduced-motion mode prevents continuous falling motion.
Metric meaning is conveyed with labels or shapes as well as color.
